Off Calendar May-11-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Nici Rodich.
Audrey Smith, Esq. for Petitioners: Patrick White and Patricia White.
Mr. Patrick White, present as Guardian at litem for: Sean White, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $3,882.26
Costs $2,803.43
A net balance of $11,646.80 to be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of America, Washington Mutual, Wells Fargo Bank, Concord, CA., with a maximum deposit not exceeding $90,000.00 to each account, and no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
